name: Pork Burritos
recipeIngredient: 1 fresh jalapeno pepper, minced (or 3 canned jalapeno peppers)
2 cans green chilies, chopped (4 oz. each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Brown pork cubes in the oil until lightly browned on all sides.
3. Add onions and bell peppers; cook for about 5 minutes or until vegetables begin to soften.
4. Stir in garlic and jalapeno pepper; cook for another 2-3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Mix in oregano, cumin, cider vinegar, and salt. Stir well to combine.
6. Cook the mixture for 1 to 1 1/2 hours, stirring occasionally, until pork is fully cooked and flavors are well developed.
7. Add chopped green chilies just before serving to prevent overcooking and maintain a fresh flavor profile.
